title: The Leonardo Collection Hand Painted Sunflower Gin Glass by Lynsey Johnstone with Gift Box, Multicoloured, JNS_475169
features: Collect designs to complete your party glassware set
600ml capacity. A very suitable gift idea for loved ones
Approx. Product Dimensions: L9x W9x H21cm
description: Product Description Sunflowers Glass Since Lesser & Pavey were established in 1971, The Leonardo Collection has grown to to become a much sought after brand with consumers, and one which you’ll only ever find it here at L&P. Our catalogue has expanded somewhat over the years and new lines are still added regularly. As well as Housewares, Figurines and Souvenirs, we have a whole section dedicated to Occasional lines, including gifts for Babies, Birthdays and Weddings, plus much more. Seasonal lines for Father’s Day, Mother’s Day and Christmas are vital for our customers also, who rely on us when stocking up at busy times of the year. Safety Warning No warning applicable
